OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Updates Clinician record with Board Certifications And HealthCare Taxonomies.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianUpdateClinicianRecordIP

childElements.name: CreateBoardCertification
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "boardCertificationName" : "=\"Board Certified\"", "boardCertificationDate" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES:certification_date%", "clinicianId" : "=%clinicianDetails:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadBoardCertificationDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: FilterAllBoardCertifiedCertifications
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "clinicianBoardCertifications" ], "filterListFormula" : "=CertificationName == \"Board Certified\"", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DeleteExistingBoardCetification
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%SetClinicianLists:certificationsToBeDeleted%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "BoardCertification", "Id" : "%SetClinicianLists:certificationsToBeDeleted%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DeleteExistingTaxanomies
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%SetClinicianLists:taxonomyListToBeDeleted%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "HealthcareProviderTaxonomy", "Id" : "%SetClinicianLists:taxonomyListToBeDeleted%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCerts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "NPPESBasic" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES%", "NPPESTaxanomies" : "=%taxanomiesFromNPPES%", "ContextId" : "=%clinicianRecordId%", "NPINumber" : "=%enteredNPINumber%", "boardCertificationStatus" : "=%boardCertificationStatus%", "boardCertificationName" : "=%boardCertificationName%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxonomiesAndCertifications", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "NPPESBasic" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES%", "ContextId" : "=%clinicianRecordId%", "NPINumber" : "=%enteredNPINumber%", "boardCertificationStatus" : "=%boardCertificationStatus%", "boardCertificationName" : "=%boardCertificationName%", "TaxonomiesToBeUpserted" : "=%taxanomiesFromNPPES%", "boardCertificationDate" : "=%basicInformationFromNPPES:certification_date%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadClinicianRecordWithTaxAndCertsNew", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3" }

childElements.name: MergeTaxanomiesFromNPPESWithClinician
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "clinicianTaxanomies", "matchingPath" : "Name", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "taxanomiesFromNPPES", "matchingPath" : "desc", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "clinicianTaxanomies", "taxanomiesFromNPPES" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
